programs.title: Addams Family Values
programs.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programs.title: In & Out
programs.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programs.title: Mother
programs.desc: A neurotic, twice divorced sci-fi writer moves back in with his mom to solve his personal problems.

programs.title: Freedom Writers
programs.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programs.title: Congo
programs.desc: When an explorer’s quest for a diamond mine ends tragically in the Congo, his father and the operation’s CEO sends Dr. Karen Ross, into the jungle to continue the hunt…maybe for his son, but definitely for the diamonds.

programs.title: Project Almanac
programs.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless.  But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world.  Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?
